product.name: ArWoWear T31 Flame Arc Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Trudnopalne z ochroną przed łukiem elektrycznym
product.categorySourceGroup: Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Vat Dyed, Workwear Fabrics Resistant up to 100 Wash
product.titleDescriptor: 89% Cotton 10% Polyamide 1% Carbon, Flame Retardant, Antisatic Fabric, 330 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 330 g/m², 89% Cotton 10% Polyamide 1% Carbon, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T31 Flame Arc Pro is heavy weight 330 gr/m', 89% Cotton 10% Polyamide 1% Carbon,, vat dyed, flame retardant, antistatic workwear fabric.
It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
Due to carbon fibers used on the back side of the fabric it has antistatic certification. (EN 1149-5)
Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)
It is durable up to 100 washing.
89% Cotton 10% Polyamide 1% Carbon, Flame Retardant, Antisatic Fabric, 330 gr/m'2
330 g/m², 89% Cotton 10% Polyamide 1% Carbon, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 89% Cotton (CO) 10% Polyamide 1% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>1400N; Weft>1200N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>30N; Weft>25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

evidence: descriptions: It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 11611 welding protection certification directly ties this fabric to welding/metalworking protective use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Explicit electric-arc protection (EN 61482) with tested ATPV rating is a direct indicator of use in electrical/high-voltage work environments, going beyond generic antistatic property.
EN ISO 11612 flame/heat protection certification alone does not explicitly state firefighter/turnout-gear use; product is framed as general FR workwear shirt/coverall.
No explicit military, police or tactical use stated despite protective workwear nature.

evidence: descriptions: It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
primary.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 11611 welding protection certification directly ties this fabric to welding/metalworking protective clothing, satisfying the taxonomy's requirement for explicit welding/metal-processing use.

evidence: Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)
secondary.rationale: Explicit electric-arc protection with tested ATPV rating (EN 61482) independently supports use in electrical/high-voltage work environments, beyond generic antistatic property, warranting a secondary energy-sector application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: EN ISO 11612 flame/heat certification is present but the product is framed as general FR/welding workwear shirt, not firefighter turnout gear.
General FR/antistatic workwear category, but narrower welding and energy sectors are explicitly supported by certifications, making them more specific and dominant.
No explicit military or tactical use stated.
